narrative:
Bay Village-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 992 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.2 percentage points.
